tasks.rules:
define Target {_id: null,deleted: null,type: null,pass: null,date: null}define Contact {contact: null,reports: null}define Task {_id: null,deleted: null,doc: null,contact: null,icon: null,date: null,title: null,fields: null,resolved: null,priority: null,priorityLabel: null,reports: null,actions: null}rule GenerateEvents {when {c: Contact}then {var idx1,idx2,r,target,now=Utils.now();function isFormSubmittedInWindow(e,t,i,a,r){var n=!1,s=0;return e.forEach(function(e){!n&&0<=t.indexOf(e.form)&&e.reported_date>=i&&e.reported_date<=a&&(s++,(!r||e.fields&&e.fields.follow_up_count>r||r<=s)&&(n=!0))}),n}function isChildUnder5(e){if(e.contact&&e.contact.date_of_birth){var t=new Date(e.contact.date_of_birth),i=new Date(now-t.getTime());return Math.round(i/2592e6)<60}return!1}function countReportsSubmitted(e,t){return e&&e.reports?e.reports.filter(function(e){return e.form===t}).length:0}function hasGivenConsent(e){var t='',i=[];e&&e.reports&&0<(i=e.reports.filter(function(e){return'infant_child'===e.form&&e.fields&&e.fields.consent&&''!==e.fields.consent.child_consent_today})).length&&(t=Utils.getMostRecentReport(i,'infant_child').fields.consent.child_consent_today);return t}function isSmallBaby(e){var t,i=[];e&&e.reports&&0<(i=e.reports.filter(function(e){return'infant_child'===e.form&&e.fields&&e.fields.first_visit_6_months&&''!==e.fields.first_visit_6_months.small_baby_today})).length&&(t=Utils.getMostRecentReport(i,'infant_child').fields.first_visit_6_months.small_baby_today);return t}function referralMade(e){if(e&&e.fields){if(e.fields.first_visit_6_months&&e.fields.first_visit_6_months.refer_flag_small_baby&&'1'===e.fields.first_visit_6_months.refer_flag_small_baby)return!0;if(e.fields.neonatal_danger_signs&&e.fields.neonatal_danger_signs.refer_neonatal_danger_sign_flag&&'1'===e.fields.neonatal_danger_signs.refer_neonatal_danger_sign_flag)return!0;if(e.fields.child_danger_signs&&e.fields.child_danger_signs.refer_child_danger_sign_flag&&'1'===e.fields.child_danger_signs.refer_child_danger_sign_flag)return!0;if(e.fields.malnutrition_anemia){if(e.fields.malnutrition_anemia.refer_muac_flag&&'1'===e.fields.malnutrition_anemia.refer_muac_flag)return!0;if(e.fields.malnutrition_anemia.refer_muac_flag&&'1'===e.fields.malnutrition_anemia.refer_palm_pallor_flag)return!0}if(e.fields.immunizations&&e.fields.immunizations.refer_vaccines_flag&&'1'===e.fields.immunizations.refer_vaccines_flag)return!0;if(e.fields.problem_solving&&e.fields.problem_solving.refer_slow_to_lear_specifics_flag&&'1'===e.fields.problem_solving.refer_slow_to_lear_specifics_flag)return!0}return!1}function getReferralReasons(e){var t='REASONS';return e&&e.fields&&(e.fields.first_visit_6_months&&e.fields.first_visit_6_months.refer_flag_small_baby&&'1'===e.fields.first_visit_6_months.refer_flag_small_baby&&(t+='referral.infant_child.refer_flag_small_baby
'),e.fields.neonatal_danger_signs&&e.fields.neonatal_danger_signs.refer_neonatal_danger_sign_flag&&'1'===e.fields.neonatal_danger_signs.refer_neonatal_danger_sign_flag&&(t+='referral.infant_child.refer_neonatal_danger_sign_flag
'),e.fields.child_danger_signs&&e.fields.child_danger_signs.refer_child_danger_sign_flag&&'1'===e.fields.child_danger_signs.refer_child_danger_sign_flag&&(t+='referral.infant_child.refer_child_danger_sign_flag
'),e.fields.malnutrition_anemia&&(e.fields.malnutrition_anemia.refer_muac_flag&&'1'===e.fields.malnutrition_anemia.refer_muac_flag&&(t+='referral.infant_child.refer_muac_flag
'),e.fields.malnutrition_anemia.refer_muac_flag&&'1'===e.fields.malnutrition_anemia.refer_palm_pallor_flag&&(t+='referral.infant_child.refer_palm_pallor_flag
')),e.fields.immunizations&&e.fields.immunizations.refer_vaccines_flag&&'1'===e.fields.immunizations.refer_vaccines_flag&&(t+='referral.infant_child.refer_vaccines_flag
'),e.fields.problem_solving&&e.fields.problem_solving.refer_slow_to_lear_specifics_flag&&'1'===e.fields.problem_solving.refer_slow_to_lear_specifics_flag&&(t+='referral.infant_child.refer_slow_to_lear_specifics_flag
')),t}var targets=[],tasks=[{icon:'child',title:'task.infant_child',appliesTo:'contacts',appliesIf:function(e){return console.log('Logging from first infant-child task ...',e),e.contact.parent&&e.contact.parent.parent&&e.contact.parent.parent.parent&&isChildUnder5(e)},appliesToType:['person'],actions:[{form:'infant_child',modifyContent:function(e,t){t.child_consent=hasGivenConsent(e),t.num_child_visits=countReportsSubmitted(e,'infant_child'),t.small_baby=isSmallBaby(e)}}],events:[{id:'infant_child_first_visit',days:0,start:0,end:21}],resolvedIf:function(e,t,i,a){return!1}},{icon:'followup-general',title:'task.referral_follow_up',appliesTo:'reports',appliesIf:function(e,t){return console.log('Logging from referral follow-up task ...',t),referralMade(e,'infant_child')},appliesToType:['infant_child'],actions:[{form:'referral_follow_up',modifyContent:function(e,t,i){t.last_visit_date=r.reported_date,t.referral_reasons=getReferralReasons(i)}}],events:[{id:'referral_follow_up',days:0,start:1,end:3}],resolvedIf:function(e,t,i,a){return!1}},{icon:'followup-general',title:'task.referral_follow_up_test',appliesTo:'reports',appliesIf:function(e){return console.log('Logging from referral follow-up test task ...',e),!0},appliesToType:['infant_child'],actions:[{form:'referral_follow_up',modifyContent:function(e,t,i){t.last_visit_date=r.reported_date,t.referral_reasons=getReferralReasons(i)}}],events:[{id:'referral_follow_up',days:0,start:1,end:3}],resolvedIf:function(e,t,i,a){return!1}}];for(idx1=0;idx1
